gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/165)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/165)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَخٌ لِأَبٍ وَ جَدٌّ قَالَ الْمَالُ بَيْنَهُمَا سَوَاءً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A brother from the father, and the grandfather?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wealth is between the two of them, equally’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a brother from a father and grandfather. He (the Imam) said, ‘The legacy between them is distributed in equal shares.’”
